name: Matrix
description: A high-performance, decoupled full-stack retail management platform designed for modern inventory control.
problemSolved: Small to medium retailers often struggle with opaque inventory data, leading to stockouts or over-ordering. Matrix provides a centralized 'Command Center' for real-time clarity.
features: Real-time low-stock visualization using dynamic data charting.
Secure multi-role authentication (Admin/Staff) via JWT.
RESTful API architecture ensuring seamless communication between Django and React.
Automated multi-metric analytics for sales and inventory tracking.

name: EduBoard
description: A collaborative real-time drawing and brainstorming tool built on the MERN stack.
problemSolved: Remote collaboration often lacks the spontaneity of a physical whiteboard. EduBoard allows teams to visualize ideas together with zero lag.
features: Sub-second data synchronization across multiple concurrent clients.
Scalable Node.js backend capable of handling multiple active 'rooms'.
Persistent canvas state allowing users to return to their drawings later.
Custom drawing toolkit including shapes, freehand, and clear-canvas functions.

name: Hansini
description: A mission-driven web presence for the women-led NGO, Hansini.
problemSolved: Grassroots organizations often lack the digital visibility to attract donors and volunteers. This platform provides a professional face to amplify their community impact.
features: Dynamic 'Stories' section to highlight community success and outreach.
Optimized 'Join Us' forms to streamline volunteer onboarding.
Responsive UI/UX designed to build trust and professional credibility.
Fast-loading architecture using a unique Flask and Node.js hybrid approach.

name: Event Reminder
description: A categorized event tracking system with a robust Java-based backend.
problemSolved: Generic calendar apps can be cluttered. This system categorizes urgency and priority, helping users focus on what actually matters (Work vs. Personal).
features: Custom-built HTTP server powered by Gradle for high-speed local processing.
Real-time polling system for group event decision making.
Dynamic priority tagging (Urgent, Work, Personal) with color-coded UI.
Persistent data storage with a lightweight, secure Java implementation.

name: MedCenter
description: A comprehensive healthcare portal integrated with AI-driven patient support.
problemSolved: Accessing medical information or 24/7 support is often difficult. MedCenter bridges this gap with an AI assistant and instant ambulance integration.
features: AI-powered chatbot using Python for real-time patient symptom guidance.
Voice-to-text and Text-to-speech integration via Web Speech API.
Secure PHP-based authentication for patient and doctor department pages.
Real-time 24/7 ambulance notification and department management system.
